title: Grassy Grass
description: Much more lush, grassier and fancier grass!
body: ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/564ba4f5050a8cc33f0ca973a1302fcb.gif) ### This pack is originally from my pack [Minecraft Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) but I thought some people may like it but not my pack, so I decided to give it, it's standalone pack! Isn't it weird how the most untamed of wilderness in Minecraft always have perfectly cut lawn grass? Well this pack changes just that! With this pack, grass blocks will have some oh so lightly short grass growing out of them, giving your nature a lot more of a alive, lush and wild feel! ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) **You either need a Shader OR the FabricAPI for the grass to render correctly!** --- **Fully compatible right out of the box with other resource packs, no matter the style!** ![Excalibur](https://i.gyazo.com/6aac09917b23ddbb5d8ee84c7880d83f.gif) Photon Shader used for the screenshots. Resource packs used: [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined), [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) & [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)    ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) [![Discord](https://i.gyazo.com/27c2c5a92a9c063d5d71e74afaabc22d.png)](https://discord.gg/rstmkrGeFJ) ![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png) [![Ad](https://i.gyazo.com/5a2618c30403aaceb78a5bceb2b8efd2.png)](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) Want to support Reimagined? For no extra cost, I get a part of the revenue via the purchases made through [this](https://partners.shockbyte.com/reimagined) link
